name: Suna Dining Chair
subtitle: Woven Rush Seat, Oak Frame
description: Suna (砂, 'sand') takes a Shaker simplicity and softens it with a hand-woven rush seat from the Loire Valley. Each seat is unique — the rush pattern tightened by a single craftsperson over two hours. The solid white oak frame is steam-bent to allow a subtle backward lean that makes long dinners comfortable.
care: Dust with a dry cloth. Occasional light oiling of the rush seat helps maintain flexibility. Keep away from prolonged moisture exposure.
shipping: Shipped flat-pack. Minimal assembly (legs attach in under 10 minutes). Pair or set options at checkout.
metaDescription: Suna Dining Chair — hand-woven rush seat on steam-bent white oak frame. Crafted in Denmark and France. From $420 — BeautyHome.
altText: Suna dining chair with hand-woven rush seat and steam-bent white oak frame, shown at a walnut dining table
